  "communicative_function": "The statement is affirming personal autonomy, introspection, and self-reliance, encouraging self-trust and inner clarity.",

    "Truth can be subjective and may not require external validation.",
    "Clarity and understanding are personal experiences that can be independent of external agreement."

}
